meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-14 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A softer night after a strong run: 7h43 at score 79 off a 22:58 bedtime — 11 minutes over the 7-day average (7h32) but eight points down from Sunday's 87. Deep sleep thinned to just 38 minutes and awake time rose to 17, pulling quality into the fair band despite the solid duration. The autonomic picture eased: HRV settled to 40 (−5 vs the previous night, still +2 over the 38 average), RHR ticked up to 55, and morning stress stayed low at 21. Stage mix was light-led — 5h10 of light — with REM strong at 1h55. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Mon 13 (Monday–Tuesday), following Monday's 2.2 km pool intervals. Readiness is moderate: the hours are there but depth was shallow. A reasonable base for today's hack squat — keep the warm-up thorough.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Mekša noć nakon snažnog niza: 7h43 uz ocjenu 79 i lijeganje u 22:58 — 11 minuta iznad 7-dnevnog prosjeka (7h32), ali osam bodova ispod nedjeljnih 87. Duboki san stanjio se na samo 38 minuta, a budnost je porasla na 17, spustivši kvalitetu u osrednji raspon unatoč solidnom trajanju. Autonomna slika je popustila: HRV se smirio na 40 (−5 vs prethodna noć, ipak +2 iznad prosjeka od 38), RHR je porastao na 55, a jutarnji stres ostao je nizak 21. Struktura vođena laganim snom — 5h10 — uz snažan REM 1h55. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Pon 13 (ponedjeljak–utorak), nakon ponedjeljkovih bazenskih intervala 2,2 km. Spremnost je umjerena: sati su tu, ali dubina je bila plitka. Razumna osnova za današnji hack squat — temeljito se zagrij.
